temporal_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on an older man with graying hair, wearing a dark suit jacket. He is smiling as he holds an old-fashioned cell phone to his ear. In the dimly lit background, which has a greenish-blue tint, other people are seated, looking on. The on-screen text "风行网" is visible in the upper left corner. The audio begins with a man speaking in a calm, slightly amused tone, as if he's just finished a pleasant conversation on the phone. His voice is clear and relaxed. The camera cuts to a tight close-up of a younger man's face in profile. He has dark hair and a mustache and looks intently at something off-screen. The shot is framed by the vertical bars of what appears to be a jail cell, creating a sense of confinement. The "风行网" text remains in the corner. Immediately following his words, a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins. The camera pans down, following the younger man's gaze. It moves past the cell bars, revealing a dark, indistinct background. The shot is shaky, enhancing the feeling of tension and unease. The "风行网" text is still present. The music is characterized by a deep, resonant, and rhythmic beat that creates a tense and foreboding atmosphere, suggesting an impending confrontation or a dangerous situation. The camera continues its downward pan, focusing on the man's hand as he grips the bars of the cell. The shot is a close-up on his hand and the metal bars, emphasizing his confinement. The "风行网" text is visible throughout the scene.
